title: EmotionCheckin
description: Append-only emotional check-in event. Student Edition is authoritative for raw events; Teacher/Profile/Godot consume via file handoff.

event_id.description: Stable dedupe key (Student sync-contract: ignore duplicate event IDs).

timestamp_epoch_millis.description: UTC epoch millis when the child checked in.

emotion.description: Emoji, keyword, or short label (e.g. happy, calm, worried, or leading emoji).

context.description: Optional free-text context (morning routine, school, sensory break, etc.).

teacher_domain_id.description: Primary curriculum domain when known. Emotional flags default to EMOTIONAL_REGULATION.

hardware_stub_id.description: When source_surface is hardware_stub, references real_world_gadgets.json id (e.g. esp32_emotion_sensor).
